description_long: This is a large, military-style helicopter with a camouflage paint scheme, featuring a robust fuselage and a prominent main rotor with five long, black blades. The helicopter is equipped with a tail rotor mounted on the left side of the tail boom, and has a set of landing gear that appears to be wheels rather than skids, suitable for heavy-duty operations. The cockpit is located at the front, with multiple angular, tinted windows providing visibility for the pilots. Along the sides, there are several hardpoints or pylons, likely for mounting external equipment or armaments, and the body is detailed with various hatches, panels, and antennas. The overall design suggests a focus on durability and utility, with reinforced structural elements and a streamlined yet rugged appearance. No visible registration numbers or civilian markings are present, emphasizing its utilitarian or military function.
description: A large, camouflaged military helicopter with five-blade main rotor, side-mounted tail rotor, wheeled landing gear, and angular cockpit windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the five-blade main rotor, angular cockpit windows, and the helicopter's broad, armored nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the camouflage pattern, side-mounted tail rotor, and wheeled landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical arrangement of pylons and landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the full length of the fuselage, rotor blades, and the detailed undercarriage.
attribute_rotor_blades: Five long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black, with no visible markings; each blade extends nearly the full width of the helicopter.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor is present on the left side of the tail boom, featuring three short, straight blades in a horizontal orientation, colored gray with no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: No landing skids; the helicopter uses a wheeled landing gear system with visible wheels and support struts.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple angular cockpit windows at the front, arranged in a wraparound configuration, tinted and framed in dark material, providing wide visibility.
